sub_nodes.name: Design Filter
sub_nodes.description: Compute stable filter coefficients for the target signal.

sub_nodes.name: Apply Filter
sub_nodes.description: Apply the designed filter to produce the filtered signal.

sub_nodes.name: Initialize Distances
sub_nodes.description: Initialize the source distance and default values for remaining nodes.

sub_nodes.name: Relax Edges
sub_nodes.description: Iteratively relax edges to improve shortest-path distance estimates.

sub_nodes.name: Cholesky Factor
sub_nodes.description: Factor the system into a triangular representation.

sub_nodes.name: Triangular Solve
sub_nodes.description: Use the triangular factors to solve for the output vector.

sub_nodes.name: Build DP Table
sub_nodes.description: Compute the dynamic-programming table for subsequence lengths.

sub_nodes.name: Backtrack Subsequence
sub_nodes.description: Recover the longest common subsequence from the DP table.

sub_nodes.name: Factorize Matrix
sub_nodes.description: Compute the factorization of the input matrix.

sub_nodes.name: Extract Components
sub_nodes.description: Extract the desired components from the factorization result.

sub_nodes.name: Initialize Parameters
sub_nodes.description: Set initial parameter values for the optimization.

sub_nodes.name: Iterate Optimization
sub_nodes.description: Run the iterative optimization loop until convergence.

sub_nodes.name: Extract Solution
sub_nodes.description: Extract the optimal parameters from the converged state.

sub_nodes.name: Compute Transform
sub_nodes.description: Apply the forward frequency-domain transform to the signal.

sub_nodes.name: Analyze Spectrum
sub_nodes.description: Extract the relevant spectral features from the transform output.

sub_nodes.name: Partition Elements
sub_nodes.description: Divide elements into sub-groups for ordered processing.

sub_nodes.name: Merge Ordered
sub_nodes.description: Combine partitioned sub-groups into the final sorted order.

sub_nodes.name: Build Distance Table
sub_nodes.description: Compute the edit distance table between the two sequences.

sub_nodes.name: Trace Alignment
sub_nodes.description: Recover the optimal alignment or edit operations from the table.

sub_nodes.name: Detect Features
sub_nodes.description: Identify the key features or events in the input signal.

sub_nodes.name: Compute Metric
sub_nodes.description: Derive the target metric from the detected features.

sub_nodes.name: Fit Model
sub_nodes.description: Fit the interpolation or approximation model to the data points.

sub_nodes.name: Evaluate Model
sub_nodes.description: Evaluate the fitted model at the target query points.

sub_nodes.name: Assign Clusters
sub_nodes.description: Assign data points to cluster centroids or groups.

sub_nodes.name: Refine Centroids
sub_nodes.description: Update cluster centroids or boundaries based on assignments.

sub_nodes.name: Specify Model
sub_nodes.description: Define the probabilistic model with prior and likelihood.

sub_nodes.name: Fit Or Sample
sub_nodes.description: Perform inference via sampling or optimization.

sub_nodes.name: Summarize Results
sub_nodes.description: Extract posterior summaries or point estimates.

sub_nodes.name: Initialize Traversal
sub_nodes.description: Set up the traversal frontier with the starting node(s).

sub_nodes.name: Explore Neighbors
sub_nodes.description: Iteratively visit neighbors and collect results.

sub_nodes.name: Prepare Kernel
sub_nodes.description: Set up the convolution or correlation kernel.

sub_nodes.name: Apply Convolution
sub_nodes.description: Apply the kernel operation across the input signal.

sub_nodes.name: Compute Statistics
sub_nodes.description: Compute the normalization statistics (mean, std, min, max).

sub_nodes.name: Apply Transform
sub_nodes.description: Apply the normalization transform to the data.
